title: tanacetum roylei
intro: Tanacetum roylei, also known as Himalayan Tansy, is a perennial plant in the Asteraceae family native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as borneol and borneol acetate. The health benefits of Tanacetum roylei include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Tanacetum roylei can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a convenient and accessible way.
